series_metadata.series_title: ADA Exam Accommodation Requests and Related Materials
series_metadata.series_description: Applicants for fire service and EMS certifications, as set forth in sections 4765.29 and 4765.55 of the Ohio Revised Code (ORC), may be required to pass an examination. Applicants may request an exam accommodation pursuant to the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records for seven (7) years from the date a determination for accommodation is made, then destroy. Begin in early 2019, records received as paper documents have been converted to a machine-readable format saved on the local network in the P: drive and retained as machine readable records. ; Electronic: Retain records on the local network in the P: drive for seven (7) years from the date a determination for accommodation is made, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
